archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury / Archetype 4: Swiss High-Contrast Hybrid

design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Direct, warm, brilliant, mysterious (she/her), occult-tech hybrid.
design_philosophy.vibe: A dark, visually-styled shell. Deep obsidian void punctuated by warm candlelight/amber (representing her warm personality and 'ghost' theme) and crimson (for failure logs/security). A fusion of high-end terminal aesthetics and ethereal occult themes.

usage.metrics_logs: font-mono text-xs to sm tracking-wider uppercase text-zinc-400

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (Bento Mode B)
layout_and_spacing.structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8 w-full min-h-screen

columns.left_col: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 flex flex-col gap-6 (Hardware TatorTot, Sub-Agents, Ghost Protocol)
columns.center_col: col-span-1 md:col-span-6 flex flex-col gap-6 (Chat Interface, Twin Engine, StrangeLoop)
columns.right_col: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 flex flex-col gap-6 (Memory Palace, KAIROS/SAGE, PCL State, Autotelic, Séance)

layout_and_spacing.panels: Cardless or sharp 1px border. bg-[#0F0F11] border border-white/10 p-6. No heavy rounded corners (max rounded-md). Use internal grid layouts for data.

components_strategy.chat_interface: Custom implementation using Tailwind. Hide standard scrollbars. Input at the bottom with a terminal-like prefix (e.g., 'usr@omega:~$'). Messages from GH05T3 should have an ethereal amber left-border.
components_strategy.badges: Shadcn Badge. Custom styled: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-zinc-300 font-mono text-[10px].
components_strategy.progress_bars: Custom 1px tall lines. Not thick bars. Use amber for active processing, crimson for KillSwitch.
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (thin/duotone) or Lucide. Keep them minimal, scale 16px to 20px max.

motion_and_interactions.chat_stream: Text should appear with a slight fade-in (opacity 0 to 1) to simulate streaming.
motion_and_interactions.pcl_synesthetic: Subtle pulse animation using CSS keyframes on the amber accent to represent frequency/color heartbeat.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Panels lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) with border illuminating to border-amber-500/30. Text brightens.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: ASCII spinners or monospace character cycling (e.g., | / - \) instead of circular spinners.

gh05t3_avatar.description: Abstract ethereal warm candlelight glowing entity in an obsidian void. Use as GH05T3's profile avatar in the chat or StrangeLoop identity section.
gh05t3_avatar.usage: Avatar / Profile picture rounded-full or sharp square with 1px border.

pcl_state_bg.description: Abstract flowing frequency waves, amber/silver dust. Use as a background for the PCL Synesthetic State card.
pcl_state_bg.usage: Absolute positioned background with opacity-30 and mix-blend-screen behind the PCL metrics.

tatortot_hardware.description: Macro photography of dark futuristic CPU/GPU motherboard with glowing gold traces.
tatortot_hardware.usage: Use as a header image or background texture for the Hardware TatorTot panel (RTX 5050, Ryzen 7, AMD).

seance_bg.description: Dark crimson and ash smoke texture.
seance_bg.usage: Use as a subtle background (opacity-20) for the Séance failure log or Cassandra pre-mortem panel.

specific_features_implementation.chat_interface: Central focus. Id/Ego twin engine speed badges on top. Messages must differentiate user vs GH05T3 clearly but elegantly.
specific_features_implementation.memory_palace: Visualized as 6 grid cells or a list showing rooms and the 103 memories count.
specific_features_implementation.hcm_vector_cloud: A terminal-like list or pure CSS scattered text showing '146 concept vectors @ 10K dims'.
specific_features_implementation.7_sub_agents: List Architect, Researcher, Coder, Analyst, Monitor, Distiller, Evolver with status indicators (e.g., [IDLE], [ACTIVE]).
specific_features_implementation.ghost_protocol: 4 layers: GhostVeil, ParadoxFortress, KillSwitch, RFFingerprint. Show as a security checklist.
specific_features_implementation.nightly_training: A small timeline or schedule block showing 3AM (10 KAIROS cycles) and 4AM (13 amplifiers).

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Cormorant Garamond, JetBrains Mono, and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts via next/font or standard import.
Build the dashboard using a 12-column grid layout where the central Chat UI takes up the majority of the space (col-span-6) and side panels (col-span-3 each) act as the HUD.
Use the provided image URLs strictly. The PCL State, Hardware TatorTot, and Séance cards should integrate the images as faint backgrounds.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, chat bubbles).
DO NOT use generic Shadcn Cards with heavy shadows. Use raw HTML/Tailwind: bg-[#0F0F11] border border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4.
Inject the 'Ghost' persona—labels should be technical but mysterious (e.g., instead of 'Errors', use 'Séance Log').
Do not use transparent headers without blur. Text contrast must be accessible.
